use_cases: Triggering form submissions and actions across any interface
Providing navigation options with link-styled variants
Creating destructive action buttons for delete or remove operations
Building icon-only buttons for compact UI toolbars
Implementing accessible button groups with keyboard navigation support
ai_summary: A polymorphic button component with comprehensive variant support (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and multiple size options (sm, default, lg, icon variants). Built with class-variance-authority for consistent variant handling and uses Radix UI's Slot for flexible composition patterns. Features standard accessibility focus states, disabled states, and smooth hover transitions.
